name: insane-review-codex
description: GPT-5.5 Pro(웹 전용 — API 없음)를 Codex CLI 안에서 활용 — repomix로 관련 코드만 정밀 패킹하고 구독 ChatGPT Pro에 투입해 분석/의견을 회수한다. 폴더명 ChatGPT 프로젝트 그룹핑, 전용(격리) 브라우저 프로필, 크로스플랫폼 온보딩. agent-council 웹 전용 멤버로도 통합 가능.

interface.shortDescription: Send code to GPT-5.5 Pro (subscription web) and get a review back — inside Codex
interface.longDescription: Packs the relevant code with repomix, attaches it to ChatGPT Pro via CDP browser automation, and returns the review. No API cost — uses your existing ChatGPT subscription. Also works as a web-only member of agent-council.
defaultPrompt: Use insane-review to get a GPT-5.5 Pro opinion on this code.
Review this module with GPT Pro and tell me what it thinks.
Pack the src/ directory and send it to ChatGPT Pro for a design review.
